_readme: UK free-to-air broadcaster for each WC2026 match, keyed by openfootball match number (the `num` field in worldcup.json). Source of truth for the index.html fixtures panel's 'on TV in the UK' line. There is NO open feed that carries this; it is curated from the BBC/ITV confirmations (broadcastnow.co.uk / live-footballontv.com / per-match how-to-watch listings). BBC & ITV share the 104 matches and both show the final. Update when broadcasters confirm later rounds: QF (97-100), SF (101-102) and 3rd place (103) are 'TBC' in real life until announced round-by-round (still TBC as of this update — QF channels unassigned even where teams are known). Channel 'TBC' renders a muted 'UK channel TBC' hint; a missing entry renders nothing. Keep `num` keys as strings.
source: BBC/ITV Round-of-32 + Round-of-16 confirmations (broadcastnow.co.uk, live-footballontv.com, per-match ESPN/Goal/SportsMole how-to-watch listings, July 2026)
